ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mushroom_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "mushroom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mushroom species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., macro, micro) */,
  "camera_used" TEXT /* Camera model used to take the image */,
  "image_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the image (e.g., 1024x768) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat type */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat (e.g., urban, grasslands) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the habitat (e.g., temperate, tropical) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil found in the habitat */,
  "vegetation" TEXT /* Type of vegetation found in the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "mushroom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mushroom species */,
  "population_density" TEXT /* Density of the population (e.g., scattered, numerous) */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of observation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the population */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mushroom_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "mushroom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mushroom species */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who submitted the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes provided by the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sighting */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mushroom_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, citizen scientist) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., mycology, ecology) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation (e.g., university, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the report (e.g., helpfulness) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES mushroom_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mushroom_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of mushroom */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the type (e.g., cap shape, gill attachment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similar_species" (
  "similar_species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similar species record */,
  "mushroom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mushroom species */,
  "similar_mushroom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the similar mushroom species */,
  "similarity" TEXT /* Similarity score between the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similar_species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mushroom_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic record */,
  "mushroom_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mushroom species */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., cap shape, gill size) */,
  "characteristic_value" TEXT /* Value of the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)
